name: COPD Exacerbation Diagnosis Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) exacerbations. Used in pharmacotherapy management of COPD exacerbation (PCE) measure to identify qualifying acute exacerbation events.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease with (acute) lower respiratory infection
Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease with (acute) exacerbation
